name: Nordic UART Service (NUS)
description: The BLE NUS component provides a Bluetooth Low Energy UART interface based on the Nordic UART Service. It can be used to stream logs or enable custom bidirectional communication with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: Mode of operation. One of `logs` or `uart`. `logs` streams ESPHome logs. `uart` provides bi-directional communication. Defaults to `logs`.

config_entries.label: Debug
config_entries.description: Log BLE NUS traffic to the ESPHome log for troubleshooting. Bare `debug:` enables hex logging with sensible defaults.

config_entries.label: Direction
config_entries.description: Which side of the bus to log. Defaults to `BOTH`.

config_entries.label: Debug Prefix
config_entries.description: Prefix prepended to every debug log line. Useful when multiple UART buses log at the same time.

config_entries.label: Dummy Receiver
config_entries.description: Capture incoming bytes even when no UART device component is bound to the bus. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: After
config_entries.description: When to flush accumulated bytes to the log.

config_entries.label: Bytes
config_entries.description: Flush after this many bytes have been accumulated. Defaults to 150.

config_entries.label: Timeout
config_entries.description: Flush after no bytes have been seen for this long. Defaults to `100ms`.

config_entries.label: Delimiter
config_entries.description: Flush as soon as this byte sequence is seen in the stream.

config_entries.label: RX Buffer Size
config_entries.description: Size of the receive buffer in bytes. Range: 160-8192. Defaults to `512`. Valid only for mode `uart`.

config_entries.label: TX Buffer Size
config_entries.description: Size of the transmit buffer in bytes. Range: 160-8192. Defaults to `512`.
